name: greenwake_height_tile_family_v1
direction: Generate only geometry/material masters with Sprixen. Do not generate props, trees, shrubs, items, characters, or complete maps inside terrain tiles.

required_shapes.prompt_shape: single flat 2:1 isometric diamond terrain top tile, no side walls, transparent corners
single raised 2:1 isometric terrain block, visible top and clean side faces, height level one
raised terrain edge tile with side face visible along the north/back edge, clean tile alignment
raised terrain edge tile with side face visible along the south/front edge, clean tile alignment
raised terrain edge tile with side face visible along the east/right edge, clean tile alignment
raised terrain edge tile with side face visible along the west/left edge, clean tile alignment
raised terrain outer corner tile, clean two-face corner, variants for north-east, south-east, south-west, north-west
raised terrain inner corner cut tile, clean concave corner, variants for north-east, south-east, south-west, north-west

blend_shapes.prompt_shape: flat terrain blend edge from warm moss grass to compact dirt, four directional edge variants
flat terrain blend edge from moss grass to muted leaf-litter forest floor, four directional edge variants
trampled dirt path embedded in grass: straight, corner, T, crossing, cap variants

negative_prompt: tree, bush, rock, flower, log, prop, item, character, creature, building, wall, complete map, scene background, UI frame, text, watermark, realistic render, noisy clutter, object on top
